title: Matrix Algebra — Multiplication & Transposes
description: Teaches matrix multiplication as function composition, the transpose operation, and the critical distinction between row-major storage (HLSL default, DirectXMath) and column-major storage (GLSL default, GLM), which is the source of transposition bugs when porting between APIs. Students will multiply 4x4 matrices by hand, verify results against a GPU shader, and correctly write shader constant buffer layouts that match their CPU-side math library conventions.
